## BaseSuggestion.queryHTML property

Highlights the matching part of the suggestion query with the query passed as prop of the component putting it inside a `<span>` tag.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
protected get queryHTML(): string;
```

## Remarks

The query prop should be normalized.
